Class MasterHandler

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2.MasterHandler
public class MasterHandler extends Object
Instances of this class are the controlling units of the translation. They control how the translation is delegated to different SMTHandlers and collects the translations.

It keeps track of the actual translation of an expression but collects also the declarations and axioms that occur during the translation.

It has measures to ensure that symbols are defined and axiomatized at most once. This allows us to add these entries on the fly and on demand.

    MasterHandler.SymbolIntroducer
    This interface is used for routines that can be used to flexibly introduce function symbols.

  • Constructor Details

    • MasterHandler

      public MasterHandler(Services services, SMTSettings settings, String[] handlerNames, String[] handlerOptions) throws IOException
      Create a new handler with the default set of smt handlers.
      Parameters:
      services - non-null services
      settings - settings from the proof for the property settings.
      handlerNames - fully qualified class names of the handlers to use. If empty, all available handlers are used.
      handlerOptions - arbitrary String options for the handlers to process
      Throws:
      IOException - if the handlers cannot be loaded

  • Method Details

    • addDeclarationsAndAxioms

      public void addDeclarationsAndAxioms(Properties snippets)
      Copy toplevel declarations and axioms from a collection of snippets directly and make all named declarations (name.decls), axioms (name.axioms) and deps (name.deps)
      Parameters:
      snippets -

    • translate

      public SExpr translate(Term problem)
      Translate a single term to an SMTLib S-Expression.

      This method may modify the state of the handler (by adding symbols e.g.).

      It tries to find a SMTHandler that can deal with the argument and delegates to that.

      A default translation is triggered if no handler can be found.

      Parameters:
      problem - the non-null term to translate
      Returns:
      the S-Expression representing the translation

    • translate

      public SExpr translate(Term problem, SExpr.Type type)
      Translate a single term to an SMTLib S-Expression.

      The result is ensured to have the SExpr-Type given as argument. If the type coercion fails, then the translation falls back to translating the argument as an unknown function.

      This method may modify the state of the handler (by adding symbols e.g.).

      It tries to find a SMTHandler that can deal with the argument and delegates to that.

      A default translation is triggered if no handler can be found.

      Parameters:
      problem - the non-null term to translate
      type - the type of the resulting s-expression
      Returns:
      the S-Expression representing the translation

    • getExceptions

      public List<Throwable> getExceptions()

    • translate

      public List<SExpr> translate(Iterable<? extends Term> terms, SExpr.Type type) throws SMTTranslationException
      Translate a list of terms into a list of SExprs.
      Parameters:
      terms - non-null list of terms.
      type - the non-null smt type to coerce to
      Returns:
      a list of translations
      Throws:
      SMTTranslationException - if the type conversion is impossible

    • translate

      public List<SExpr> translate(Iterable<? extends Term> terms)
      Translate a list of terms into a list of SExprs without coercion.
      Parameters:
      terms - non-null list of terms.
      Returns:
      a list of translations
